summary: Extraction-fidelity review accepted. The three PubMed EFetch source snapshots identify the same PMIDs as their source records, and each reviewed provenance-bearing source, eligibility, study, outcome, result, finding, and risk-of-bias record points to the matching PMID-specific source_snapshot_id. Abstract-extracted and triage-summary maturity labels remain bounded to the available PubMed metadata/abstract source.

findings.claim_or_issue: No source mismatch found across the reviewed provenance updates: PMIDs 31542391, 36857968, and 40010154 each have a PubMed EFetch source_snapshot whose source_id, payload_summary.pmid, and URL PMID match the corresponding source record.
findings.why_it_matters: The candidate's extraction provenance depends on the source_snapshot_id linking each extracted or triage-derived record back to the correct source article.
findings.recommended_action: No change required for this lane.

findings.claim_or_issue: The 22 reviewed non-snapshot records that carry provenance each contain one source_snapshot_id, and each source_snapshot_id matches the record's source_id: pmid-31542391 to snapshot-pmid-31542391-pubmed-efetch-2026-06-27, pmid-36857968 to snapshot-pmid-36857968-pubmed-efetch-2026-06-27, and pmid-40010154 to snapshot-pmid-40010154-pubmed-efetch-2026-06-27.
findings.why_it_matters: This confirms the candidate did not attach an abstract extraction, eligibility decision, risk-of-bias note, outcome, result, finding, or source metadata record to the wrong PubMed snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: No change required for this lane.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate creates only metadata/abstract PubMed EFetch source snapshots, stores no raw XML or text snapshot, and preserves abstract_extracted or triage_summary maturity/status language on records whose extraction is bounded to PubMed metadata and abstracts.
findings.why_it_matters: Extraction fidelity would be overstated if metadata-only snapshots were treated as full-text support or if legacy triage summaries were silently upgraded.
findings.recommended_action: Keep full-article extraction and reconciliation as a separate future candidate when reusable full text or article tables are available.
